source_metadata.title: 2025/12/03 - SSC (Part 1)
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 3 December 2025 | Social Services and Community Committee

2024/25 Annual review of the Ministry of Social Development

This video includes live interpreting. The goal is to provide clear and accurate information, but some details may be missed or contain errors. It is shared to give you access to the information, but please double-check any details before relying on them.

Hearing of evidence: 

Hon Louise Upston, Minister for Social Development and Employment

Ministry of Social Development

Debbie Power, Chief Executive
Simon MacPherson, Deputy Chief Executive, Policy
George Van Ooyen, Acting Deputy Chief Executive, Service Delivery
Karen Hocking, Group General Manager Enablement
Melissa Gill, Deputy Chief Executive, Organisational Assurance and Communications
Nadine Kilmister, Deputy Chief Executive, People and Capability
Marama Edwards, Deputy Chief Executive, Māori, Communities and Partnerships
Sacha O’Dea, Deputy Chief Executive, Strategy and Insights
Anne Shaw, Deputy Chief Executive, Disability Support Services
Alastair Hill, General Manager DSS Transformation
Justine Cornwall, General Manager DSS Policy
Tracy Voice, Deputy Chief Executive, Transformation
Hannah Kerr, Director Child Wellbeing and Poverty Reduction
